quotes.quote_text: “ This is no very striking resemblance of your own character , I am sure , ”

context.quote_text: “ for I have always seen a great similarity in the turn of our minds . We are each of an unsocial , taciturn disposition , unwilling to speak , unless we expect to say something that will amaze the whole room , and be handed down to posterity with all the _ éclat _ of a proverb . ”
“ How near it may be to _ mine _ , I can not pretend to say . _ You _ think it a faithful portrait , undoubtedly . ”
“ I must not decide on my own performance . ”

quotes.quote_text: “ How near it may be to _ mine _ , I can not pretend to say . _ You _ think it a faithful portrait , undoubtedly . ”

context.quote_text: “ for I have always seen a great similarity in the turn of our minds . We are each of an unsocial , taciturn disposition , unwilling to speak , unless we expect to say something that will amaze the whole room , and be handed down to posterity with all the _ éclat _ of a proverb . ”
“ This is no very striking resemblance of your own character , I am sure , ”
“ I must not decide on my own performance . ”
“ When you met us there the other day , we had just been forming a new acquaintance . ”
